scenes.narration: This observatory is a Week 14 packaging layer over committed Week 8 through Week 13 evidence. The sole production action authority remains the Week 12 rollback checkpoint, with the general controller only.
scenes.title: Authority and scope

scenes.narration: Week 8 closed a reusable symbolic pushing skill with 20/20 recorded reuse, and Week 9 showed bounded contribution with 10/12 successful attempts and explicit support transitions.
scenes.title: Reusable skill and contribution

scenes.narration: Week 13 kept ambition and apprenticeship bounded and inspectable: ambition persisted across episodes and reload, while human teaching resolved justified help in the symbolic environment.
scenes.title: Ambition and apprenticeship

scenes.narration: Week 11 achieved 52/52 on narrow angular cohorts, but Week 12 measured only 0/32 on broader transfer cases that were oracle-solvable in 32/32 cases. The candidate was therefore rejected and rolled back.
scenes.title: Narrow specialist rejection

scenes.narration: The authoritative rollback checkpoint is dde86c0f167653e54db4db74b477fa271b1ee8a2b09e452d0aa622f80d049093. The rejected specialist is inactive, the router is unregistered, and complete SeedMind claims no familiar-task advantage over the rollback controller.
scenes.title: Rollback checkpoint

scenes.narration: Four bounded claims are supported: reusable-skill advantage over simple baselines, ambition persistence, apprenticeship resolution, and retention-gated growth governance. Broad angular transfer remains explicitly unsupported.
scenes.title: Week 13 claim status

scenes.narration: The production controller reached 36/100 on the familiar suite and 15/40 on the broader ball stress suite. Week 14 packages evidence; it does not claim new cognition, general intelligence, or broad real-world transfer.
scenes.title: Limitations and close

title: SeedMind Week 14 scripted demonstration
week14_capability_boundary: This demo narrates existing evidence; it does not demonstrate new cognition.
